_notes: Subjective tagging of question ambiguity. high = requires domain inference / non-obvious formula; med = one interpretive choice (metric, output shape, ratio def, temporal edge); low = fully specified.

rationales.s20: 'distribution' — histogram bins vs count per qty value?
rationales.s22: 'from a single order' — return scalar max, or the order's details?
rationales.j23: 'most ordered' = by order count or by units (qty)?
rationales.j24: 'after 2023' — inclusive of Dec 2023 or starting Jan 2024?
rationales.t07: requires inferring self-serve = (rep IS NULL) + 'break down' shape
rationales.t19: 'revenue contribution' — absolute dollars or percent share?
rationales.t20: refund rate ratio definition + small-n rep tiebreaks
rationales.t24: 'total discount amount' — not a column; needs qty*unit_price*discount
rationales.s15v: vague variant of s15 — 'total revenue' no unit (dollars vs cents)
rationales.s25v: vague variant of s25 — 'typical order worth' (mean vs median + unit)
rationales.j04v: vague variant of j04 — 'customers spend the most' (no top-N, no unit)
rationales.j15v: vague variant of j15 — 'best-selling' (revenue vs units vs orders)
rationales.t04v: vague variant of t04 — 'top hardware buyers' (N, metric, unit unstated)
rationales.t13v: vague variant of t13 — 'biggest for software' (revenue? customers? orders?)
rationales.c10v: vague variant of c10 — 'loyal/one-off' (repeat/first-time def + unit)
rationales.c18v: vague variant of c18 — 'come back for more' (>1 order? retention?)
rationales.s06v: vague variant of s06 — 'popular out west' (most common? by region?)
rationales.s08v: vague variant of s08 — 'concentrated' (count? proportion? density?)
rationales.s11v: vague variant of s11 — 'premium' (price? margin? positioning?)
rationales.s14v: vague variant of s14 — 'sales volume last year' (orders vs units vs $; last year=2024 or 2025?)
rationales.s21v: vague variant of s21 — 'order volume trending' (count vs qty vs $; granularity?)
